title: Result of the 3-day Variable Rate Repo (VRR) auction held on June 02, 2026
description: Tenor 3-day Notified Amount (in ₹ crore) 75,000 Total amount of bids received (in ₹ crore) 17,445 Amount allotted (in ₹ crore) 17,445 Cut off Rate (%) 5.26 Weighted Average Rate (%) 5.26 Partial Allotment Percentage of bids received at cut off rate (%) NA Ajit Prasad           Deputy General Manager (Communications)    Press Release: 2026-2027/370
